query.query_string: Deferiprone AND beta-thalassemia with other manifestations

data.query: Deferiprone AND beta-thalassemia with other manifestations

results.title: Alternative treatment paradigm for thalassemia using iron chelators.
results.abstract: beta-thalassemia major, or Cooley's anemia, is a red blood cell disorder requiring lifelong blood transfusions for survival. Erythrocytes accumulate toxic iron at their membranes, triggering an oxidative cascade that leads to their premature destruction in high numbers. We hypothesized that removing this proximate iron compartment as a primary treatment, using standard and alternative orally active iron chelators, could prevent hastened red cell removal and, clinically, perhaps alleviate the need for transfusion.

results.title: Multiple transfused thalassemia major: ocular manifestations in a hospital-based population.
results.abstract: To study the ocular manifestations in multiple transfused beta-thalassemia major patients and assess the ocular side-effects of iron chelating agents.
